title: Buggy’s Power and Nami’s Choice
main_description: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami become entangled with Buggy’s crew. Buggy’s presence turns the town’s danger into a direct pirate conflict, while Nami’s actions reveal both cunning and hesitation.
key_events: Nami’s deal with Buggy becomes dangerous.
Luffy refuses to behave like a normal captive.
The fight against Buggy’s crew begins to take shape.
